patterns.failure_pattern: qwen3:30b did not complete strict JSON under 3s timeout
patterns.repair_instruction: Use longer timeout, smaller model, or qwen3-coder with JSON-only prompt controls.

patterns.failure_pattern: thinking text precedes JSON in probe
patterns.repair_instruction: Always run JSON extraction and never score raw text as JSON.
Keep READY_FOR_HUMAN_REPAIR_REVIEW or BLOCKED until direct validator artifacts exist.
